{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Tear of the Deep
| introduced = Wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Tear of the Deep]] is a high-grade natural treasure that produces [[water aura]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c20">''Wintersteel'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[The Spring of Celestial Starlight]] is believed to be refined from a [[Tear of the Deep]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c7">''Waybound'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
